channel.title: Route Advertisement on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Route Advertisement on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Summarized advertised gateway prefixes for route advertisement
item.description:
Azure public preview now lets you configure summarized advertised gateway prefixes for route advertisement. Azure gateways, including ExpressRoute and VPN Gateway, can advertise summarized prefixes to on-premises networks instead of all individual prefixes.

  • Source: Azure Updates
